{{Party/end}} =====Second battle===== Each of Lusamine's Pokémon has an aura that boosts one of its [[stat]]s, similar to the aura seen on the [[Totem Pokémon]]. Her Pokémon all have a perpetual angry expression, the same as when a Pokémon uses a [[Z-Move]]. Despite this, no Z-Moves are used within the fight and all her Pokémon lack any [[Z-Crystal]]s. The player will not gain [[prize money]] after winning. {{Party | background = {{locationcolor/light|space}} | border = {{locationcolor/dark|space}} | headcolor = {{white color}} | sprite = VSLusamine 2.png | size = 150px | prize = none | class = Aether President | classlink = Lusamine | name = Lusamine | location = Ultra Deep Sea | locationname = Ultra Space | game = SM | pokemon = 5 }} {{Pokémon | gen = 7 | ndex = 0036 | pokemon = Clefable | gender = female | level = 50

{{color2|000|Stat#Defense|Defense}} +1 | type1 = Normal | type2 = Fighting | ability = Fluffy | move1 = Baby-Doll Eyes | move1type = Fairy | move1cat = Status | move2 = Hammer Arm | move2type = Fighting | move2cat = Physical | move3 = Take Down | move3type = Normal | move3cat = Physical | move4 = Pain Split | move4type = Normal | move4cat = Status }} {{Party/end}} =====Status unknown===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Lusamine |pkmn=Nihilego |type1=rock |type2=poison |img=Lusamine Nihilego.png |img2=Lusamine Nihilego fused.png |cap2=Lusamine possessed by Nihilego |epnum=Pokémon Sun and Moon |desc=In {{g|Sun and Moon}}, Lusamine catches a {{p|Nihilego}} in a [[Beast Ball]] in [[Ultra Deep Sea]] and sends it out, willingly letting the [[Ultra Beast]] merge with her body to battle the {{player}}. Their merged appeared to have empowered her Pokémon and made them angrier during the battle. After the combined Lusamine is defeated in battle, [[Nebby]] forcefully separates the two, and Nihilego returns to its Beast Ball, which falls next to Lusamine. It's unknown if Nihilego was left behind in Ultra Space as the player and the others escaped. None of Nihilego's moves are known.}}
